Here is information about a user and a new Digital Music "Astra" being recommended to the user. For the user, we have the user's review history. For the new item being recommended, we have the item review history by other users.

### User Review History ###
1. Last Time Around
Positive Aspects: Improved guitar, production, songwriting, best performed Springfield songs, standout tracks like Four days Gone, Pretty Girl Why, Special Care, Uno Mundo, and Questions
Negative Aspects: Not mentioned
User Preference Elements: Musical quality, production value, songwriting prowess, standout tracks

2. Every Good Boy Deserves Favour
Positive Aspects: Good album, Liked the concept
Negative Aspects: Hasn't stuck with the reviewer like previous albums
User Preference Elements: Moodied out after the first classic 5 albums

3. David Gilmour
Positive Aspects: Beautiful album, Songs written during Animals era, Better than Animals album
Negative Aspects: None mentioned
User Preference Elements: Songwriting, Musical quality, Personal preference

4. Peter Gabriel
Positive Aspects: Well produced, Plays well, Did the unexpected
Negative Aspects: Not what was expected
User Preference Elements: Expectations, Originality, Creativity

5. Rocks
Positive Aspects: Magnum opus of 70's rock, Combination of drug use and raw talent, Magic while it lasted
Negative Aspects: Caught up with them at the end of the decade
User Preference Elements: Nostalgia, Authenticity, Musicality

6. Aerosmith
Positive Aspects: Raw, Crude, Energetic, Priority on Songs, Unique Sound
Negative Aspects: Lousy Recording Quality
User Preference Elements: Energy, Songs, Vintage Sound, Rawness

7. Playing the Fool: Official Live Gentle Giant
Positive Aspects: Ultimate live collection, On Reflection madrigal counterpoint singing, Document of unsung heroes of prog rock, Talented and underrated band
User Preference Elements: Musical quality, Unique vocal style, Historical significance, Talent recognition

8. Van Halen
Positive Aspects: Energized, Raw recording, Captures live act, Monster album
Negative Aspects: Not mentioned
User Preference Elements: Authenticity, Live performance feel, Production quality

9. 1984
Positive Aspects: Best songs by Dave, Smart move leaving on top, Bonus track for fans
Negative Aspects: Not mentioned
User Preference Elements: Quality of songs, Artist's decision, Bonus content

10. Diver Down
Positive Aspects: Classic VH sound, Popular among fans
Negative Aspects: Uneven mix of cover songs and originals
User Preference Elements: Musical style, Fan appeal

### Item Review History by other users ###
1. Astra
Positive Aspects: Top-notch vocals, Excellent instrumentals, Classic Asia sound, Excellent lead guitar work, Booming drums
Negative Aspects: None mentioned
User Preference Elements: Progressive Rock and Roll, Classic Asia sound, Excellent instrumentals, Top-notch vocals

2. Astra
Positive Aspects: Highly talented musicians, few decent tunes
Negative Aspects: Mainstream sound, commercial, too polished, too mellow, keyboards predominant over guitar
User Preference Elements: Originality, Musical Depth, Instrument Balance

3. Astra
Positive Aspects: Excellent tracks, John Wetton's songwriting, Dynamism, Power ballads, Support from fans
Negative Aspects: Disintegration of the band
User Preference Elements: 80's pop rock, Survivor, Journey, John Wetton fans

4. Astra
Positive Aspects: Best track "Go", Voice of America, "Hard On Me", "Fishing", "Rock and Roll", "Too Late", Keyboard solo in "Suspicion", "After the War"
Negative Aspects: "Countdown to Zero", "Love Now Till Eternity"
User Preference Elements: Time needed to appreciate certain tracks, Under-rated album, Classic Asia's studio album

5. Astra
Positive Aspects: Great songs, Side one tracks, Solid tracks, Good sound quality
Negative Aspects: Eighties sound quality, Side two tracks not as strong
User Preference Elements: Remixed and remastered albums, Favorite songs, Great record, Fine music

6. Astra
Positive Aspects: Some songs reminiscent of classic Asia, Good production quality, Emotional vocals on certain tracks
Negative Aspects: Lack of Steve Howe's guitar work, Songs don't fully capture old Asia feel, Inconsistency in sound
User Preference Elements: Expectation based on previous Asia albums, Desire for a more cohesive sound, Appreciation for emotional and haunting tracks

7. Astra
Positive Aspects: Excellent album, Brilliant vocals, Catchy tracks, Pleasant melodies, Accessible and catchy
Negative Aspects: Some sappy songs, Awkward chorus in "Hard on Me"
User Preference Elements: Catchy tracks, Pleasant melodies, Accessible music, 1980s Cold War theme

8. Astra
Positive Aspects: Side one tracks, Some tracks on side two, Fine music recorded in the eighties
Negative Aspects: Thin and washy sound quality, Some tracks on side two not as enjoyable
User Preference Elements: Improved sound quality, Remix of first few albums, Updated sound, Fine music from the eighties

9. Astra
Positive Aspects: Improved sound quality, tougher-sounding music, more memorable songs, excellent guitar work by Mandy Meyer, top form performances by band members
Negative Aspects: Lack of commercial success, no hits on the album
User Preference Elements: High quality music, fresh sound, enjoyable arena rock, value for money

10. Astra
Positive Aspects: Progression, Orchestration, Innovation, Contemporary 80s pop
Negative Aspects: None mentioned
User Preference Elements: Unique collection of tracks, Best song, Overlooked in discography

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity

# Load the user reviews and ratings data
user_reviews = pd.read_csv('user_reviews.csv')

# Convert the text data to TF-IDF vectors
vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
tfidf_vectors = vectorizer.fit_transform(user_reviews['review_text'])

# Compute the cosine similarity between the user reviews
similarity_matrix = cosine_similarity(tfidf_vectors, tfidf_vectors)

# Load the user ratings
user_ratings = pd.read_csv("user_ratings.csv")

# Load the album features
album_features = pd.read_csv("album_features.csv")

average_ratings = merged_data.groupby("album_name")["rating"].mean()

# Print the average ratings
print(average_ratings)
